title: CT7.N01 completed discharge record ‚Äî Definition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT7.N01, the definition node ‚ÄúDefinition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface‚Äù of tactic CT7 (Exchange trichotomy). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT7.N01. It must be exactly `CT7`, selecting Exchange trichotomy (exchange) as the tactic that owns the definition step ‚ÄúDefinition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface‚Äù in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation ‚ÄúDefinition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface‚Äù. It must be exactly `CT7.N01` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT7.N01 within tactic CT7 (Exchange trichotomy). It must be exactly 1, matching the N01 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT7.N01. It must be exactly `defined`, meaning that the required definition or recorded branch-state object has been supplied for the definition obligation ‚ÄúDefinition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface‚Äù; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT7.N01. The array must contain `S-Def`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to ‚ÄúDefinition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface‚Äù. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Def` to occur in CT7.N01's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that constructs a typed object deterministically from recorded branch-state data for the obligation ‚ÄúDefinition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface‚Äù.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT7.N01 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Def (subject, sourceStateFields, constructor, parameters, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Def` evidence instance at CT7.N01. It must be exactly `S-Def`, identifying the contract that constructs a typed object deterministically from recorded branch-state data; the same instance must supply subject, sourceStateFields, constructor, parameters, evidence.

statement.informal: Define or verify: Definition ‚Äî bounded exchange pair A‚â§ftrightarrow A' with common interface

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
